title: North Korea Deploys Its First Destroyer, Vowing to Project Nuclear Power by Sea
summary_full: The 5,000-ton Choe Hyon is the largest warship North Korea has ever built and is said to be armed with nuclear-capable missiles.
summary_public: The 5,000-ton Choe Hyon is the largest warship North Korea has ever built and is said to be armed with nuclear-capable missiles.
